query:
-- Unique registered users who signed in or were active today
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_users_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS email_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'oauth' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oauth_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS other_users
FROM users
WHERE DATE(lastSignedIn) = CURDATE();

-- Also check session/heartbeat activity today
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) AS active_session_users_today
FROM training_sessions
WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE();
